name: font_size_larger_no_referent

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.17 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION] N段階大きな文字 with no earlier target is self-contained, rendered <span data-steps>. The target is absent from the preceding text (no-referent), so §6.14 degradation no longer applies; serialize reconstructs the bracket byte-exact (§7.6). Bytes from the reference parser.

source: 本文［＃「大」は3段階大きな文字］

expected.serialize: 本文［＃「大」は3段階大きな文字］
